title: AN  ACT   CREATING   CERTAIN   BARRIOS   IN   THE CITY OF ILIGAN

chunks.text:
H. No. 9748 / 62 OG No. 26, 4541 (June 27, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4314, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE CITY OF ILIGAN

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 24. The sitio of Suarez, to be known as the Barrio of Suarez.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
